mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_address WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user_address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_address (user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province, city, district, detail_address, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_address
receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_address SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
